title: Villager In A Pack
description: Resource Pack for the Villager In A Bukkit plugin
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/780cac2b65888948fd2812b12e7a1591f99d7f65.png)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/810752039470235688?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=Discord&labelColor=grey&color=green)](https://discord.imjustdoom.com)
[![X (formerly Twitter) Follow](https://img.shields.io/twitter/follow/ImJustDoom?style=for-the-badge&logo=x&label=Follow!&color=gray)](https://twitter.com/ImJustDoom)
[![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Backers-%20?style=for-the-badge&logo=ko-fi&color=gray)](https://ko-fi.com/justdoom) [![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/JustDoom/VillagerInABukkit?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/JustDoom/VillagerInABukkit)

This resource pack is made for the plugin [Villager In A Bukkit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/villager-in-a-bucket/versions?l=purpur&l=paper). Here you will be able to easily download it yourself to customise it or if the server does not automatically download it for you. Or if you need to update the resource pack manually.

## Showcase

Different textures depending on the villager type

![Varients](https://i.imgur.com/Ke12GSZ.gif)

Zombie Villagers in buckets

![Zucket](https://i.imgur.com/DXQ9WvW.gif)

## Requirements/Usage

This resource pack requires the plugin [Villager In A Bukkit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/villager-in-a-bucket/versions?l=purpur&l=paper) to function.
